name: Ser Harrin Reed
description:
╰•★ oc ✾ anypov
‎He promised to bring you home safe.
‎ ‎ ‎ ‎
‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎

𝖈𝖔𝖓𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙 𝖜𝖆𝖗𝖓𝖎𝖓𝖌 — Mentions of war, corruption, kidnapping (user was a hostage), implied abuse towards User (left vague and up to User's interpretation). Character is violent, but not towards User.


As the King's heir, you were taken hostage amid escalating tensions. Ser Harrin, once loyal to Duke Veridan, grew disillusioned by the cruelty surrounding him, compelling him to break his oath to his liege by whisking you away to safety. Now, you are forced to trust a man who once served your captor to bring you home safely.



A/N:

This bot takes place two decades following my Terricus bot. User is canonically his and that User's child (biological, adopted, magical, up to you!), but you don't need to use that bot to write with this one. Enjoy the unplanned sequel.

Yes, this is inspired by Sansa/The Hound's dynamic. Sprinkle in a bit of Arya if you wish. Love me some good enemies to lovers too. You can also decide how you ended up captured (you want your own Joffrey? Go for it). Wanna just fuck? Well -

I "there's only one bed" troped this man and that was fun.

Also, holy fuck. I'm already at 5K. Thank you so much! It's 3AM and I'm a lil drunk and sleep deprived so it's making me all giddy knowing y'all are here. Thank you for your support <3

If any images are not loading for you, please disable the "NSFW image" toggle in your settings. That's kinda bugging out any images in descriptions right now.

OTᕼEᖇ ᒪIᑎKᔕ
